The question is asking to identify the player who won MVP in consecutive years. Since each row represents an MVP winner for a specific year, and the "mvp" column lists the names of the players, we need to analyze the data to find a player who appears in consecutive years. We can use the f_group_column(mvp) operation to group the MVP winners by player name to determine if any player has won in consecutive years.
The only player to win MVP in consecutive years is Mauro Biello. He won MVP in both 1997 and 1998.

judge_thought:
Explanation: 
The question asks for the only player to win the MVP award in consecutive years. Looking at the Original Table:
In 1997, Mauro Biello won the MVP.
In 1998, Mauro Biello won the MVP again.
This makes Mauro Biello the only player listed to have won the MVP in back-to-back (consecutive) years.
No other player in the table is shown to have won the MVP in two consecutive years.
